dialogos.texto_en: Well then!\nEven though we took a break,\nlet's play around with what time's left!
If we keep up the pace,\nwe'll use up all the time we recovered, you know?
Oh? Where's Itsuki?
Over there.
Look, Raiha-chan,\nI took a lot of cute pictures.
Ah!\nYou even took a picture of me falling!
Itsuki, you're good at taking photos.\nThis one is the best shot of the day!
No, you can't have that one.\nI'm deleting it.
No way!!
Hey, Yotsuba,\nlet's put the viewing party on hold for now.\nWe need you to decide what we're going to do next.
Oh, right!\nSince everyone's here,\nwhat should we do next...?
Oh, Uesugi-san, what do you want to do?
I'm fine with anything.
Fu-kun, that kind of attitude is NOT helpful, you know?\nYou should think a little and decide with us.
Huh? Really?
Oh, it's fine!\nIf Uesugi-san is okay with anything,\nthen let's decide on something ourselves.
Eh.
Okay, thanks.
*sigh*
Hmm, I wonder what sounds most fun.
Hey, Yotsuba. What about banana boating?
It's not too difficult\nand we can ride together with Futaro-kun%p-2;――
Good idea, we could go banana boating!\nThanks, Ichika!
Not at all.
There was a banana boat over there that I think\neveryone could use.\nLet's go for that!
...Huh?
Yeah, that sounds good.
Okay, that's settled then.
Why don't you choose the two-seater option here,\ninstead?
Probably because it's not part of Yotsuba's plan.
What's wrong with you two?\nDon't you like banana boating?
It's not that we don't like it.
I'm sure it'll be fun!\nI'm excited because it's my first time!
New experiences have the potential to help you grow,\nno matter who you are!
Mmm, as expected, Uesugi-san.\nYou never lose your learning mindset,\neven in times like this.
That's right!\nLet's go rent the boat already!
Yeah!
I guess Futaro was supporting Yotsuba earlier,\nwasn't he?
Most likely.\nFu-kun is capable of considering stuff like that...\nbut I wish he would redirect his efforts elsewhere.
Now listen up, Futaro-kun.\nThere are different shapes of banana boats, you know.
Oh, really? I thought they were just banana-shaped.
In other words, there are large ones for groups\nand two-seaters as well. Do you understand?
I do, but...
Ah! Yotsuba's back.
Everyone, we got lucky!\nWe reserved the big eight-seater!
Wow, then everyone can ride together!\nNicely done, Yotsuba!
Ehehe, this must be the result of everyone's good deeds.
I wonder how many people\nan eight-seater banana boat can accommodate.
It might be too big. We might not be able\nto finish eating it.
Then let's go check the size\nof the eight-seater banana boat! Let's go!
Hey, hey, don't be so hasty.
Hmm, things aren't going as planned.
Come on, Ichika, you too! Hurry, hurry!
Alright, alright.\nI'm coming.
